name: @cinatra-ai/blog-draft-writer-agent
description: Stateless LLM-only leaf agent that takes a BlogIdea (title, summary, outline) plus optional tone, length, audience, voice, referenceContent, and sources, and returns a polished markdown blog draft with title, excerpt, content, and optional sourcesUsed. No HITL, no tool calls, no web_search — pure LLM generation. Caller chains web-research-agent upstream if research is needed.
